center.name: 圣玛尔塔内华达山脉
center.summary: 圣玛尔塔内华达山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联26种鸟类，包括Black-fronted wood quail、Chestnut-winged chachalaca、Band-winged nightjar等26种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is widespread in South America, where it is found in the Andes, Venezuelan Coastal Range, Santa Marta Mountains, Tepuis, most of Chile, Argentina, Paraguay, Uruguay, and eastern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found from the Cordillera de Tilarán in northwestern Costa Rica south to the Serranía de Tabasará in western Panama. The nominate subspecies is found in northern Colombia's isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, in the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombia-Venezuela border, in several parts of the Venezuelan Coastal Range, and from the Andes of Venezuela into Colombia on the east side of that country's Eastern Andes.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fasciatoventris is found in northwestern and central Colombia east to the foothills of the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta and south into the Cauca and Magdalena valleys

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An isolated record exists from above sea level. It is found in the Colombian, Venezuelan, Ecuadoran, and Peruvian Andes, including in the Sierra de Perijá, and also in the Santa Marta mountains in Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of black-fronted wood quail is found in the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta of northeastern Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia, in the Serranía del Perijá that straddles the Colombia-Venezuela border, and from Trujillo in western Venezuela south through Colombia's Eastern Andes as far as Boyacá Department.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-winged chachalaca is found in northern Colombia in an area roughly bounded on the west by the Sinú River, in the east by the foothills of the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, and in the south by the lower Cauca and Magdalena River valleys

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Andes of southwestern Venezuela, Colombia's Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, intermittently in all three Colombian Andes ranges, and more or less continuously south through Ecuador's Andes into extreme northern Peru

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cinerascens is found in the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia, the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombia-Venezuela border, and in the mountains of western and northern Venezuela from Zulia and Táchira east to Sucre and Monagas states. The golden-bellied flycatcher inhabits the canopy and edges of humid to wet montane forest, especially cloudforest, in the upper tropical and subtropical zones

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: decora is found in the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta of northern Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: calorhynchus, Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta and Serranía del Perijá in northeastern Colombia and eastward to Lara in northwestern Venezuela The species primarily inhabits humid montane forest but is also found in semi-open landscapes like secondary forest, forest edges and nearby isolated trees, and gardens

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia, in the Serranía del Perijá that straddles the Colombia-Venezuela border, in the Andes from northeastern Trujillo in Venezuela into the northern part of Colombia's Eastern Andes, and nearly continuously in the Andes from Colombia's Central and Western ranges south through Ecuador and Peru into Bolivia as far as Santa Cruz Department.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: orinomus is found in Colombia, in the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in the north and in the Eastern Andes of Norte de Santander and Cundinamarca departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia, in the Andes in the Venezuelan states of Barinas, Mérida, Trujillo, and Lara, in more northerly mountains in Lara and Yaracuy, and in the Venezuelan Coastal Range east to Miranda

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Santa Marta parakeet is found only in the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, an isolated mountain range in northern Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Colombian Andes, the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia, in the Serranía del Perijá that straddles the Colombia/Venezuela border, and in western Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: sanctaemartae is found in Colombia's isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, in the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombian-Venezuelan border, and in the Venezuelan Andes and Coastal Ranges

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | pages = }} *Extreme eastern Panama and slightly into northwestern Colombia *In the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia *In the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombia-Venezuela border *From extreme southwestern Colombia south through western Ecuador to Loja Province *From southern Napo Province in Ecuador south to central Peru *The valleys of the Cauca and Magdalena rivers in Colombia and into western and northern Venezuela *From eastern Venezuela east across Guyana and Suriname into French Guiana *Locally in southeastern Venezuela and northern Amazonian Brazil The sooty-headed tyrannulet primarily inhabits humid evergreen forest in the tropical zone

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Andes of Venezuela's Trujillo, Mérida, and Táchira states, in the Serranía del Perijá that straddles the Colombia-Venezuela border, in northern Colombia's isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, along all three chains of the Colombian Andes, and south through central Ecuador and central Peru into western Santa Cruz Department in Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Turquoise-winged parrotlets are found in northern Colombia from the Caribbean coastal region southwest of the Santa Marta Mountains, Atlantico, and south along the Rio Magdalena in Bolívar and Cesar. Turquoise-winged parrotlets are most often found in drier, open or riparian woodlands, cerrado, caatinga, savanna, palm groves, semi-arid scrubland, and pastures

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Andean condor is found in South America in the Andes and the Santa Marta Mountains

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lazuline sabrewing is found in the mountains of north-central and western Venezuela, the Sierra de Perijá on the Venezuela-Colombia border, the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta and Eastern Andes of Colombia, and into Ecuador as far south as Napo Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rivularis of the white-capped dipper is found in the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Venezuela's Sierra de Perijá, Colombia's Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, and the Andes from Venezuela through Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Bolivia into northern Chile and northwestern Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The coppery emerald is found in Colombia's lower Magdalena River valley and Santa Marta department (including the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta) and also Serranía del Perijá that straddles the northern Colombia/western Venezuela border

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in humid montane forests, normally at elevations between , in the Andes from northern Argentina, through Bolivia, Peru, Ecuador, Colombia, to Venezuela, with isolated populations in the Venezuelan Coastal Range, Serranía del Perijá and Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta
